description_long: This object is a medium-sized, cream-colored ceramic pot with a wide, rounded body and a slightly flared rim. The pot has a subtle, natural marbled texture and appears unglazed or only lightly glazed, giving it a matte, earthy finish. Emerging from the pot is a single, thick, twisted stem supporting a large, reddish-pink, succulent-like leaf with wavy, irregular edges and some greenish-yellow highlights. The plant looks artificial or highly stylized, with a dramatic, almost sculptural form. The pot's opening is wide, and the interior is partially visible, showing some dark soil or filler material. The overall appearance suggests a decorative potted plant suitable for both indoor and outdoor urban environments.
description: A cream-colored ceramic pot with a wide opening holds a single, twisted stem and a large, reddish-pink, succulent-like leaf. The pot has a natural matte finish and a subtle marbled texture.
description_view_0: The pot is seen from the side, with the twisted stem and leaf arching out to the right, showing the pot's rounded body and wide opening.
description_view_1: The large reddish-pink leaf is most prominent, facing forward and partially obscuring the pot's opening.
description_view_2: The stem and leaf extend to the left, revealing the pot's full body and the subtle marbled texture on its surface.
description_view_3: The view is from behind the plant, showing the back of the leaf and the pot's rim, with the stem entering the soil at the center.
attribute_plant_species: succulent (likely Echeveria or similar stylized variety)
